title: Senior Executive, Actuarial (IFRS17)
description:
This role offers a unique opportunity to contribute to the actuarial function by supporting IFRS17 valuation processes, capital reporting, and product implementation. It plays a key part in driving financial insights and ensuring regulatory compliance, directly supporting the organization’s mission of delivering accurate and transparent financial reporting.

The successful candidate will gain hands-on experience with valuation models, exposure to strategic business initiatives, and the chance to deepen their expertise in actuarial software and regulatory frameworks. This is an ideal role for someone progressing through actuarial exams and looking to grow in a collaborative, high-impact environment.

Position Responsibilities:

  • Preparation and analysis of Drivers of Earnings and CSM rollforward under IFRS17

  • Support for implementation of new products into the valuation model

  • Support for Basis Change, LICAT Capital reporting, and other valuation requirements

  • Opportunity to be involved in other key business initiatives and projects

Required Qualifications:

  • Initial progression on actuarial exams

  • 2 years + of working experience

  • Knowledge of Singapore market and regulations is an asset

  • Knowledge of AXIS or another actuarial software is an asset

  • Good knowledge in MS Office (Excel, Access, Word, Power Point)

  • Team player oriented as well as can follow up tasks independently

When you join our team:

  • We’ll empower you to learn and grow the career you want.

  • We’ll recognize and support you in a flexible environment where well-being and inclusion are more than just words.

  • As part of our global team, we’ll support you in shaping the future you want to see.

postedCompany.description:
MANULIFE (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.

Manulife is a leading Canada-based financial services group with principal operations in Asia,
Canada and the United States. Clients look to Manulife for strong, reliable, trustworthy and
forward-thinking solutions for their most significant financial decisions. Our international network
of employees, agents and distribution partners offers financial protection and wealth
management products and services to millions of clients. We also provide asset management
services to institutional customers. Funds under management by Manulife and its subsidiaries
were approximately C$635 billion (US$574 billion) as at March 31, 2014. Our group of
companies operates as Manulife in Canada and Asia and primarily as John Hancock in the
United States.


Manulife Financial Corporation trades as ‘MFC’ on the TSX, NYSE and PSE, and under ‘945’ on
the SEHK. Manulife can be found on the Internet at manulife.com.
postedCompany.name: MANULIFE (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
